description: Synapse Network MCP paid API calls via discover_services; not Synapse.org/Sage Bionetworks Synapse.
name: io.github.SynapseNetworkAI/synapse-network-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: SynapseNetwork Agent Key beginning with agt_. Used as the Gateway X-Credential header.
environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_AGENT_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Gateway environment preset: prod or staging. Use prod for production workflows; staging is for preview and E2E validation.
environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_ENV

environmentVariables.description: Optional custom Gateway base URL. Overrides SYNAPSE_ENV.
environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_GATEWAY_URL

title: Synapse Network MCP Server for paid API calls
